rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF GERALD G WILLIAMS
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 2/6/2023. The following information must be supplemented 7 days prior. 1) Petition to clarify the total value of the decedentâs estate. #9 does not affirm the total value of the estate; 2) Corrected I&A filed on 9/19/2022 to include Attachment #2; 3) Petition to specify assets on hand. CRC 7.550(b)(4); 4) Petition to propose distribution in detail. Paragraph #19 does not describe specific assets (ex. The exact dollar amount to whom). CRC 7.651 and LRSF 14.35.I.(6); 5) Proof of 15 days of service of Notice of Hearing to Mr. Anthony Williams. Prob. Code Sec. 11000(a). Notice of Hearing [JC Form DE-120] must be used; and 6) Proposed Order must be submitted prior to the hearing. LRSF 14.7.A. Proposed Orderâs caption to be read Order Approving Final Distributionâ¦â¦for the courts operational purpose. All information must be submitted for filing two weeks prior.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF RICHARD MAHLON FRAZER
rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Counsel or parties appearing in person must wear a mask covering their nose and mouth at all times while in the courthouse. Please review LRSF 14.1(D) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: IN RE: ERIC SCOT KOZIOL
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION Verified Petition For Order Confirming Personal Property To Petitioner, Decedent'S Wife
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 02/22/2023 by the judicial officer after review of the file. Julie Koziol, the decedent's mother and one of the heirs residing in Colorado, must be served at least 30 days before the hearing in accordance with Probate Code section 851(a) and CCP sections 413.10 et seq., in the absence of a court-appointed personal representative of the decedent's probate estate. Counsel's declaration filed on 12/12/2022 does not show Julie Koziol was personally served at least 30 days before the hearing. While the declaration states that Julie Koziol verbally acknowledged receipt of papers sent to her Colorado address via US mail on 11/30/2022, the declaration does not state whether a return receipt was required. Moreover, the date of mailing must be at least 40 days before the hearing. See CCP section 415.40. The Court cannot shorten the notice period under section 851(d). No later than 02/15/2023, a proof of timely service on Julie Koziol showing compliance with CCP 413.10 et seq. must be filed.
